description.overview: An ancient Italian guardian breed with dramatic loose skin and wrinkles. Neapolitan Mastiffs are devoted protectors who are calm but always alert.
description.history: The Neapolitan Mastiff originated in Italy.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, dignified, watchful.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense, hard coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: An ancient Italian guardian breed with dramatic loose skin and wrinkles. Neapolitan Mastiffs are devoted protectors who are calm but always alert.
